text:
Author: wg
Date: Thu Dec 26 12:11:04 2013
New Revision: 337485
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/337485

Log:
  devel/ioncube: update to 4.5.0
  
  PR:		ports/185140
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/devel/ioncube/Makefile
  head/devel/ioncube/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/ioncube/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/ioncube/Makefile	Thu Dec 26 11:49:42 2013	(r337484)
+++ head/devel/ioncube/Makefile	Thu Dec 26 12:11:04 2013	(r337485)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ioncube
-DISTVERSION=	4.4.4
+DISTVERSION=	4.5.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads3.ioncube.com/loader_downloads/ \
 		http://dl.ispsystem.info/ioncube/${DISTVERSION}/ \
@@ -23,9 +23,6 @@ DIST_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}/${DISTVERSION}
 
 NO_STAGE=	yes
 
-# PHP 5.5 is unsupported
-IGNORE_WITH_PHP=55
-
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 # FreeBSD 10 is unsupported
